title: Minneapolis Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Minneapolis with a Z-Score of -3.86. Temperatures are extremely low, scoring 10.0/10 in severity.
body:
The current weather conditions in Minneapolis are extreme, with a critical level warning issued. 
 The temperature is expected to remain low, resulting in a high number of heating degree days (HDD) at 14.5 GG. 
 The humidity is at 69% and the wind speed is 6.6 km/h, making the cold even more unbearable.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
